data.title: Add MAX_ATTEMPTS retry budget parsing to sprint SKILL.md Phase 4 dispatch logic
data.description:
## Story
d853-bf07 — Sub-agent retry budget with model escalation

## Goal
Modify sprint SKILL.md Phase 4 (Sub-Agent Launch) dispatch logic to parse and respect the `MAX_ATTEMPTS` retry budget embedded in task descriptions.

## Implementation

### sprint/SKILL.md Phase 4 addition
Add a "Retry Budget Parsing" step to Phase 4 that:
1. Before dispatching each sub-agent task, reads the task description's `## Retry Budget` section
2. Explicitly lists the fields parsed: `MAX_ATTEMPTS` (attempts per model tier), plus model tier order (sonnet → opus)
3. On sub-agent failure:
   - Retry up to MAX_ATTEMPTS (3) times on sonnet
   - After 3 sonnet failures: collect diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages), escalate to opus
   - After 3 opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
   - If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
1. test_sprint_phase4_max_attempts_parsing passes (MAX_ATTEMPTS in Phase 4)
2. test_sprint_phase4_lists_parsed_fields passes (explicit field list including MAX_ATTEMPTS)
3. test_sprint_phase4_sonnet_opus_escalation passes (sonnet→opus escalation protocol)
4. All tests in tests/skills/test-sprint-retry-budget-dispatch.sh GREEN

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (UPDATE — add retry budget parsing in Phase 4 dispatch logic)

## Dependencies
Depends on 9e42-e5a4 (RED test must exist before implementation)
Depends on 5b12-e68d (retry budget format defined in impl-plan SKILL.md first)
